---
title: "Assignment2"
author: "Damian Ke & Kyriakos Papadopoulos"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

$$p(\overrightarrow{\mu}) = 1* N(\mu_1,0.2)*N(\mu_2,0.2)*N(\mu_3,0.2)*...*N(\mu_n,0.2)$$
$$p(\overrightarrow{\mu}) = (\frac{1}{0.2*\sqrt{2*\pi}})^{n-1}*e^{(-\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{n-1}(\mu_{i+1}-\mu_{i})^2}{0.08})}$$

$$p(\overrightarrow{Y}\mid\overrightarrow{\mu})= (\frac{1}{0.2*\sqrt{2*\pi}})^n*e^{(-\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{n}({y_i}-\mu_{i})^2}{0.08})} $$ 






#1.3
To get posterior 
$p({\overrightarrow\mu}\mid\overrightarrow{Y}) \propto p(\overrightarrow{Y}\mid\overrightarrow{\mu}) * p(\overrightarrow{\mu})$  

For case:

$p({\mu_1}\mid\overrightarrow\mu_{-1},\overrightarrow{Y}) : 1 * (\frac{1}{0.2*\sqrt{2*\pi}})^n*e^{(-\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{n}({y_i}-\mu_{i})^2}{0.08})}$ 

$e^{(-\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{n}({y_i}-\mu_{i})^2}{0.08})}$


For other cases the first part of calculations will always be
$(\frac{1}{0.2*\sqrt{2*\pi}})^{2n-1}$.
Therefore, the focus should be on the exponents.


$p({\mu_n}\mid\overrightarrow\mu_{-n},\overrightarrow{Y})$ :


$p({\mu_i}\mid\overrightarrow\mu_{-i},\overrightarrow{Y})$ :
